title: Tender Spicy Italian Morning Glory Pasta
description: A spicy and creamy Italian dish featuring morning glory pak bung, with a nostalgic twist and ayurvedic sattvic friendly ingredients. This dish is perfect for a comforting lunch.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped morning glory pak bung and cook until wilted, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the double fry kfc seasoning and stir to combine.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked pasta, morning glory pak bung mixture, and heavy cream.
Stir in the grated parmesan cheese until melted and well combined.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
